basic_details.short_information: NALCO Recruitment 2026–27: Get latest NALCO recruitment notification 2026 for 268 Technician, Operator and More vacancies. Apply online from 21 May 2026 to 10 June 2026 through the official NALCO career portal.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 36,500 – 3% – 1,15,000/- (Induction Level for Jr. Foreman posts)

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) + Trade Test (for select posts) + Document Verification + Pre-employment Medical Examination (PEME)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official NALCO website https://www.nalcoindia.com. Applications received through any other mode will not be accepted and will be summarily rejected. The online application is a 2-step process -
